title: acilepis pulneyensis
intro: Acilepis pulneyensis is a perennial plant species native to the Western Ghats in India, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acilepis pulneyensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
